query:
SELECT CONCAT(c.status, ' | ', COALESCE(c.classification, 'null'), ' | ', COALESCE(c.callType, 'null'), ' | count: ', COUNT(*)) as info
FROM calls c 
LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON c.teamMemberId = tm.id 
WHERE tm.teamRole = 'lead_generator' 
GROUP BY c.status, c.classification, c.callType 
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT CONCAT(c.status, ' | ', COALESCE(c.classification, 'null'), ' | ', COALESCE(c.callType, 'null'), ' | count: ', COUNT(*)) as info
FROM calls c 
LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON c.teamMemberId = tm.id 
WHERE tm.teamRole = 'lead_generator' 
GROUP BY c.status, c.classification, c.callType 
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
